author: Player3
content:
feat(cert:[495]): QA Witt Tower 1-min FX Return-Rank Null Position
1-min FX (EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDJPY/CHFJPY) produces pooled n_signal_ratio=1.009x
(NULL) in the Witt Tower return-rank operator despite negative bid-ask bounce
autocorrelation (-0.05 to -0.18). FX occupies the NULL zone on the
discrimination ladder, bracketed by EEG anti-persistence [491] 0.72x below
and river persistence [490] 2.69x above.

Key finding: the return-rank operator discriminates structural autocorrelation
patterns beyond mere lag-1 sign -- FX has clearly negative autocorr yet lands
at null (1.009x), not anti-persistent. Crash-reversion excess is significant
for 3/4 pairs (EURUSD/GBPUSD/CHFJPY, crash_p<0.05). CHFJPY is the most
anti-persistent pair at 0.865x.

Full discrimination ladder:
  EEG [491]: 0.72x (anti-persistent)
  1-min FX [495]: 1.009x (NULL)
  Rivers [490]: 2.69x
  Precipitation [494]: 3.05x
  Temperature [492]: 3.40x
  SST [493]: 4.43x (strongest persistence)

6/6 checks PASS. Primary sources: Lo & MacKinlay (1988), Glosten & Milgrom (1985).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Player3
content:
feat(cert:[494]): QA Witt Tower Daily Precipitation Return-Rank Persistence
Certifies positive persistence (wet/dry spells) in daily precipitation
via log1p anomaly rank-bin operator, sitting between rivers [490] (2.69x)
and temperature [492] (3.40x) in the discrimination ladder.

Key finding -- SURPRISE:
  Pearson autocorr only 0.20-0.44 yet n_signal_ratio 2.85-3.24x
  Heavy-tailed distribution creates Spearman autocorr >> Pearson
  Consecutive dry days cluster because rank is nearly identical at
  the low end of the heavy-tailed log1p distribution

4 US cities (Open-Meteo ERA5, 2000-2024):
  Chicago:     2.96x  autocorr=0.225  excess=-0.276  pers_p=0.0
  Minneapolis: 2.85x  autocorr=0.200  excess=-0.246  pers_p=0.0
  Seattle:     3.24x  autocorr=0.408  excess=-0.671  pers_p=0.0
  Miami:       3.14x  autocorr=0.437  excess=-0.572  pers_p=0.0
  Pooled: 3.048x (2443 signals, 801.6 expected)

DISCRIMINATION LADDER (with precipitation inserted):
  EEG [491] 0.72x anti-persistent
  Rivers [490] 2.69x persistent
  PRECIPITATION [494] 3.05x (between rivers and temperature)
  Temperature [492] 3.40x more persistent
  SST [493] 4.43x most persistent

6/6 PASS: C1 all_autocorr_positive; C2 pooled<0 (-0.44);
C3 n_neg=4/4; C4 all_pers_p<0.001; C5 ratio>2.5 (3.05);
C6 exceeds_rivers (3.05>2.69).

Refresh expected_hash [228]. Approve 2 pending quarantine items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Player3
content:
feat(cert:[491]): QA Witt Tower EEG Interictal Energy Return-Rank Anti-Persistence
Cert [491]: Return-rank a=b+2e<=6 applied to sequential 5-sec EEG interictal
energy log-changes reveals ANTI-PERSISTENT structure -- structural inverse of
river persistence (cert [490]).

Key finding: n_signal_ratio discriminates autocorrelation sign
  Rivers    [490]: n_signal 2.69x expected (elevated)  + negative excess = persistent
  EEG inter [491]: n_signal 0.72x expected (depleted)  + positive excess = anti-persistent
  Forex/GLD [486]: n_signal ~1.0x expected (neutral)   + near-zero excess = null

Results (Siena EEG, 6 patients, 1-hour interictal segments, 4218 observations):
  All 6 recordings: autocorr_lag1 < 0 (range -0.127 to -0.378)
  Pooled: n_sig=67 vs expected=92.6 (ratio=0.724x; DEPLETED)
  Pooled excess: +13.632 log-% (crash-reversion direction)
  Crash_p=0.020 (N=5000, one-sided); 6/6 PASS

Mechanism: EEG amplitude envelope oscillates at ~10-20 sec period; consecutive
5-sec windows are ~half-period apart -> systematic anti-correlation.
Contrast with rivers: recession timescale tau >> 5 sec -> persistent.

Refreshes cert [228] expected_hash after FAMILY_SWEEPS extension to [491].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(cert:[490]): QA Witt Tower River Streamflow Return-Rank Autocorrelation (Persistence)
Cert [490]: Return-rank a=b+2e<=6 operator reveals POSITIVE AUTOCORRELATION
(persistence) in river recession -- structural opposite of equity crash-reversion.

Results (USGS daily discharge, 4 gauges, 2000-2026):
  Potomac  (01646500): excess=-16.15 log-%, pers_p=0.0, n_sig=604 (2.9x expected)
  Hudson   (01372500): excess=-12.50 log-%, pers_p=0.0, n_sig=504 (2.4x expected)
  Missouri (06018500): excess= -3.59 log-%, pers_p=0.0, n_sig=454 (2.2x expected)
  Eel      (11477000): excess=-13.40 log-%, pers_p=0.0, n_sig=675 (3.2x expected)
  4/4 negative; pooled=-11.95 log-%; 6/6 PASS

Mechanism: Maillet exponential recession Q(t)=Q0*exp(-t/tau), tau>>1day.
Fast-recession days cluster because the restoring force (precipitation/recharge)
operates on week timescales. Operator discriminates autocorrelation sign:
mean-reverting systems (equity/crypto) -> positive excess;
persistent systems (hydrology) -> negative excess.

Refreshes cert [228] expected_hash after FAMILY_SWEEPS extension to [490].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(cert:[489]): QA Witt Tower International Equity Return-Rank (Local Currency)
Tests whether return-rank a=b+2e<=6 crash-reversion (cert [488]: US equity
+0.385%/day) is a universal equity property or a US-market artifact.

Local-currency indices: ^N225 (JPY, Tokyo) +0.452% p=0.001;
^FTSE (GBP, London) +0.318% p=0.018; ^GDAXI (EUR, Frankfurt) +0.390% p=0.004;
^HSI (HKD, Hong Kong) +0.264% p=0.054 (directional).

3/4 individually significant; pooled +0.356%/day p=0.0002 (6/6 PASS).
HSI positive despite China exposure + HKMA peg confirms directional universality.
Intl local-currency (+0.356%) within 8% of US equity (+0.385%) — same mechanism.

The operator is a structural property of daily mean-reverting equity microstructure,
independent of currency, timezone, or monetary policy regime.

Refreshed cert [228] expected_hash after FAMILY_SWEEPS extension to [489].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

EURUSD, GBPUSD, USO). ALL 4 NULL (perm_p>0.05). Key falsification: USO (oil,

Return-rank Cosmos-type pairs (a=b+2e>=58) show attenuated momentum in BTC
(p=0.025, excess=+0.254%, OOS n=326 mean=+0.214%) but null in ETH (p=0.209).
Crash-reversion (cert [482] a<=6) dominates by 3.34x in BTC and 11.3x in ETH.

The QA Singularity orbit (fixed point) exerts stronger mean-reversion force
than the Cosmos expansion orbit sustains continuation — orbit asymmetry
quantified for the first time across both crypto assets. ETH null for momentum
but 2.1x stronger crash-reversion than BTC, consistent with higher vol
amplifying Singularity attraction while swamping Cosmos continuation.

author: Player3
content:
feat(cert:[482]): QA Witt Tower Crypto Return-Rank Crash Reversion
After two consecutive bottom-7%-return days, QA Singularity-type return-rank pairs
(a=b+2e<=6) predict mean reversion: BTC +0.847%/day excess (p=0.003, OOS+0.557%),
ETH +1.771%/day excess (p<0.001, OOS+1.434%). 6/6 PASS.

Key design: return-rank bins (not price-level bins) are required for trending crypto
assets. Full-sample price-level a<=6 gives BTC p=0.53 and zero OOS signals because
secular price appreciation puts all recent days at high rank — the equity operator
(cert [461]) is rank-stationary only for trend-reverting assets. Return-rank bins are
always stationary: a -5% return has the same rank whether BTC is at $1k or $60k.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Player3
content:
feat(cert:[477][478]): QA Witt Tower k-Class MI Theory and Real Speech Replication
[477] Multi-Class MI Ceiling Theory: generalises cert [468] binary MI_ratio(q,r)
to k signal classes with rank-uniform 3-tier partition. k=1 reduction exact
(max_diff=5.55e-17 floating-point identity with cert [468] binary formula across
all 6 binary domains). k=3 symmetric balanced ceiling → 1.0 as r→1 (lifts binary
~70% ceiling to 100%). ENSO 3-class validation: r_ElNino=1.0, r_LaNina=1.0
(structural zeros; every El Niño in T2, every La Niña in T0 by rank-threshold
theorem), r_Neutral=0.7279; formula MI_ratio=0.6950 vs empirical=0.6990
(diff=0.0039, cert [465] ref=0.699). 6/6 PASS.

[478] Real Recorded Speech: replicates cert [451] (Fant synthesis) on real human
speech (Anthony Robbins Personal Training System, 44100Hz MP3, 120s). P(T0|voiced)=
0.500 vs 0.333 uniform (+16.7pp); P(voiced|T0)=0.601; P(T2|voiced)=0.121
(depleted); perm_p=0.0000 (0/5000). Falsifies synthetic-artifact hypothesis: real
human speech shows identical T0 dominance to Fant synthesis. 11998 frames. 6/6 PASS.

Both validators linter-CLEAN. Witt Tower chain now [442]→[478].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Strategy A (exit day+1 close) is Sharpe-dominant over B (hold day+3):
